replit.md.content:
# Legal/Policy Document Summarization and Q&A System

## Overview
A Flask-based web application that allows users to upload legal and policy documents (PDF/DOCX), get AI-powered summaries, and ask questions about the document content using semantic search and Google Generative AI (Gemini).

## Features
- **Document Upload**: Supports PDF and DOCX file formats
- **Text Extraction**: Automatic extraction from uploaded documents using pdfplumber and python-docx
- **AI Summarization**: Generates concise summaries using Google Gemini 2.0 Flash
- **Q&A System**: Semantic search using FAISS embeddings to retrieve relevant document chunks and answer user questions
- **Responsive UI**: Clean, modern interface that works on mobile and desktop

## Architecture

### Backend (app.py)
- **Flask REST API** with the following endpoints:
  - `POST /upload` - Upload and process documents
  - `POST /summarize` - Generate document summary using Gemini
  - `POST /ask` - Answer questions using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
  - `GET /status` - Check document status
  - `GET /` - Serve frontend

### Frontend (static/)
- **index.html** - Main UI structure with three sections: upload, summary, Q&A
- **style.css** - Responsive styling with gradient theme
- **script.js** - API integration and user interactions

### Document Processing
1. Text is extracted from uploaded documents
2. Text is chunked into ~800 word segments
3. Each chunk is embedded using Google's text-embedding-004 model
4. Embeddings are stored in a FAISS index for fast similarity search
5. When users ask questions, the top 5 most relevant chunks are retrieved as context for Gemini

## Dependencies
- **Backend**: Flask, Flask-CORS, pdfplumber, python-docx, faiss-cpu, google-generativeai, python-dotenv, numpy
- **Frontend**: Vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)

## Environment Variables
- `GOOGLE_API_KEY` - Required for Google Generative AI access (get it from https://aistudio.google.com/)

## AI Models Used
- **Chat Model**: gemini-2.0-flash-exp (latest experimental model with best performance)
- **Embedding Model**: models/text-embedding-004 (for semantic search)

## Recent Changes
- November 12, 2025: Updated to use gemini-2.0-flash-exp (current model, not deprecated)
- Fixed all LSP diagnostics and type hints
- Removed unused imports
- Improved model initialization without wasting API quota
- Added comprehensive error handling for API rate limits
- Switched from token-based to word-based text chunking

## User Preferences
None specified yet.

## Project Structure
```
.
├── app.py                 # Flask backend with Google AI integration
├── static/
│   ├── index.html        # Frontend UI
│   ├── style.css         # Styling
│   └── script.js         # Frontend logic
├── uploads/              # Temporary document storage
├── faiss_indexes/        # FAISS index storage
├── .gitignore           # Git ignore rules
└── replit.md            # This file
```

## Important Notes
- The free tier of Google AI API has rate limits (approximately 2 requests per minute for generation)
- If you hit quota limits, wait 1-2 minutes before trying again
- Check your usage at https://aistudio.google.com/
